messages.content: Do you have any fat tire bikes in a 29" size?

Currently, Rambo Bikes does not offer any fat tire bikes in a 29-inch size. Our fat tire models typically come with 24-inch or 26-inch tires. If you're interested in those options or need assistance with something else, feel free to ask!
Okay, can I order that as an option then?

Unfortunately, we do not have any fat tire bikes available in a 29-inch size. Our current fat tire models come with 24-inch or 26-inch tires. If you're interested in those options or need assistance with something else, please let me know!
Will your bike frames accept a 29" tire?

Rambo Bikes are designed specifically for 24-inch and 26-inch fat tires, and our current models do not support 29-inch tires. If you have a specific model in mind, I can provide more details on its specifications.
I am 6'6" tall and have a 38" inseam. What is your largest framed bike?

The Megatron 4.0 is Rambo's largest framed bike, designed to accommodate taller riders. It features a robust build and is equipped with dual 1,000W hub motors for excellent performance. If you're interested, you can check it out here: 🔗 rambobikes.com/products/megatron-4-0-all-wheel-drive.
